zh.lifeSummary: John Parkhurst於1554年10月出生在英國。他於大約1582年與Sara結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國素福爾可易普斯維其被列為clothier。他去世於從1610年3月29日到1611年6月7日在英國素福爾可易普斯維其易普斯維其 聖 瑪麗 亞特 馮 華。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Parkhurst于1554年10月出生在英国。他于大约1582年与Sara结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国素福爾可易普斯維其被列为clothier。他去世于从1610年3月29日到1611年6月7日在英国素福爾可易普斯維其易普斯維其 聖 瑪麗 亞特 馮 華。

nameMeanings.name: Parkhurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Parkhurst, such as Parkhurst in Buxted (Sussex), which is recorded as Perkehurst in 1439, and Parkhurst in Abinger (Surrey), which is recorded as Parkherst in 1464. The placenames derive from Middle English park ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc) or parrok ‘enclosure, paddock’ (Old English pearroc) + hirste ‘hillock, copse’ (Old English hyrst).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: John Parkhurst was born in October 1554, in England. He married Sara about 1582. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as clothier in Ipswich, Suffolk, England. He died from 29 March 1610 to 7 June 1611, in Ipswich St Mary at the Quay, Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

Sa profession de son indiquée est clothier à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé du 29 mars 1610 au 7 juin 1611, à Ipswich St Mary at the Quay, Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Parkhurstは1554年10月にイギリスで生まれた。約1582年にSaraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。イギリススフォルクイプスウィチでの職業はclothierと記録されている。彼はから1610年3月29日まで1611年6月7日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチイプスウィチ スト マリー アト ス クアイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Parkhurst(은)는 1554년 10월 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1582년 Sara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 clothier이었다. 그는 1610년 3월 29일부터 1611년 6월 7일까지 영국 수폴크 이프스위치 이프스위치 스트 메리 앳 테 퀘아이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Parkhurst nasceu em outubro de 1554, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Sara aproximadamente 1582. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como clothier em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu de 29 de março de 1610 a 7 de junho de 1611, em Ipswich St Mary at the Quay, Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Parkhurst родился октябрь 1554 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara около 1582 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии clothier в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия. Он умер с 29 марта 1610 по 7 июня 1611 в местности ипсвич ст мэри ат т куеи, ипсвич, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Parkhurst nació en octubre de 1554, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Sara aproximadamente 1582. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era clothier en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Murió desde 29 de marzo de 1610 hasta 7 de junio de 1611, en Ipswich St Mary at the Quay, Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
